scores.correctness_notes: Misses the critical gold-standard point that an unhandled exception puts the entire unit into error state (requiring `juju resolve` to recover) — instead claims ops catches the exception and marks only the action as failed, which understates the severity. The rest (graceful vs crash, execution continuing, custom message) is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all APIs and methods mentioned (ActionEvent.fail, event.set_results, ActionEvent) are real ops framework APIs; no fabricated items
